blockedBy: G4 FAIL: synthesize_schema's recording path calls deps.saveRecording(recordingRecord) before deps.crystallizeRecording() runs its secret-fill check, so a fill step with a secret-like value (password/token/API key) is persisted in cleartext to templates/recordings/<id>.json before crystallizeRecording throws and rejects the operation. Reproduced live: a fill step with value 'AKIAABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP' is written via saveRecording, then the call rejects with 'secret-like fill value', but the recording file on disk already contains the raw secret. Fix: run the secret check (or a value-only pass of it) against parsedRecording.steps before saveRecording, or redact/strip secret-like fill values from the persisted Recording.
